channel.title: Seminars on Tom M. Ragonneau
channel.description: Recent content in Seminars on Tom M. Ragonneau

item.title: Tuesday, 10 January 2023
item.description: Introduction to the missing semester course taught at MIT. In particular, the authors focused on the shell, shell tools and scripting, the vim editor, the command-line environment, and version control using git.

item.title: Wednesday, 23 November 2022
item.description: Presentation of the fifth and seventh chapters of my Ph.D. thesis. The title of this talk is “The COBYQA method.”

item.title: Friday, 18 November 2022
item.description: Presentation of the fourth chapter of my Ph.D. thesis. The title of this talk is “The SQP method.”

item.title: Monday, 14 November 2022
item.description: Presentation of the third chapter of my Ph.D. thesis. The title of this talk is “Development of the PDFO package.”

item.title: Monday, 26 September 2022
item.description: Presentation of the second chapter of my Ph.D. thesis. The title of this talk is “Interpolation models for derivative free optimization.”

item.title: Tuesday, 13 September 2022
item.description: Presentation of the first chapter of my Ph.D. thesis. The title of this talk is “Overview of derivative free optimization.”
